### Opal: Screen Time Control {#review-app-1}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      11 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 8, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Wvoqfent_, Jun 26, 2026, 1/5: "After the latest update, the app is very slow and does not block the apps even when rules are active. Please fix it!"
            2. _machitivuole_, Jul 9, 2026, 2/5: "The last update has made this app so much worse than it was!! So many things were changed that didn’t need to be changed and it’s overall so glitchy now. Moreover the push notifications have become so annoying (and way too frequent). 😔😔😔"
            3. _Camille0303R_, Jun 21, 2026, 2/5: "I have been using this app since it first came out, sadly now it’s unusable if you don’t pay. I’m honestly extremely disappointed by this new update, every update added unnecessary features and new paywalls. I used to love this app and I have recommended it to countless friends, but I’m not able to use it anymore it’s such a shame. I would prefer if the ten seconds to unlock your time limits would be with an add and in exchange not have to pay then this …"

### Notion: notes, tasks, AI {#review-app-2}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.

      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**

### Notebook - Notas, Listas, IA {#review-app-3}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 24, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alex Mercer_, May 20, 2026, 1/5: "Absolutely avoid this app, it deletes the important notes you have created, out of nowhere, absolutely avoid this app, I have no idea if it's a bug or if someone who manages our information enjoys trolling us by deleting the most important notes. Definitely choose another app."
            2. _Łukasz Daniluk_, Feb 24, 2026, 2/5: "I have just downloaded it and first experience is very buggy. In the list of the Notebooks the default one displays without any cover at all and could not open it, had to restart the app, and when I wanted to change the cover to my photo it took me to a page that says it yearly costs 4 NaN instead of 49 PLN. This bad first experience has completely snuffed any will to try out this app."
            3. _Ani Gopinathan Pillai_, Jul 15, 2026, 3/5: "I used to adore this app... until it got frustrating. Now it just crashes every time I open it ... I posted this review at least 3 times in 3 years and still the app just keeps on crashing on me when I need it most..."

### Forest: Focus for Productivity {#review-app-4}

### Microsoft To Do {#review-app-5}

### Tiimo: Planejador Diário {#review-app-6}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 20, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Maaaattu_, Feb 20, 2026, 2/5: "The AI is very dumb and slow, also the whole app is glitchy. Would not buy the premium again"
            2. _Glitter Blood_, Jul 14, 2026, 3/5: "Useful app which definitely helps with my adhd task initiation/keeping track, so lots of potential but it is quite buggy - the latest update has meant I can no longer move one days tasks to the next or to a different day - when I click them to move it nothing happens. Also annoying that if you don’t want to schedule specific times to do each task on the daily view tab, you can’t reorder them. Trying to set times is impractical and time consuming unless it’s a specific thing like a meeting, ideally you’d be able to create high to low priority on the day view, or at least reorder them easily so you can see which order you need do the tasks in - every time I try to reorder, even if I seem to successfully move a task up or down, it puts it back to where it was before if I click off that page or close the app. Would also be helpful if completed tasks automatically delete after 30 days or something on the main prioritisation lists."
            3. _Alea-pea_, Jun 23, 2026, 3/5: "I really love this app and it has helped me immensely when it comes to getting organised– although it’s an ongoing process and I’m still learning! If this app worked the way it was intended I would have given it five stars however it often glitches on my iPhone laptop and iPad. These glitches can be very frustrating. I look forward to any improvements and to upgrading my rating to five stars. Many thanks for the app!"
---

### Microsoft OneNote: Save Notes {#review-app-8}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 17, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kris Bronz_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "the app encounters a bug and does not stay open"
            2. _Tomáš_, May 18, 2026, 1/5: "That was a daily app for me, but latest update totally broken S22/S23 Ultra S Pen users. When you are in ink mode and drawing / handwriting, nothing is visible - until pen is lifted. What a stupid idiotic decision. Ink mode suppose to simulate a pen, not a invisible pen!!! update for S26 Ultra: now pinch to zoom is not working when pen is active. instead of zoom, you draw also with the fingers. I don't know... what the heck is team behind this doing"
            3. _Emma Borkent_, Apr 19, 2026, 1/5: "This app is just so bad, it is simply not functioning. It is super difficult to get your cursor to be anywhere in the app, typing or undoing is super slow, it is just not working. A shame, because I used to love OneNote years ago, but it's simply not working anymore."
---

### Routine Planner, Habit Tracker {#review-app-9}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 6, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _A-nonymous2_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "This is a step by step timer outlining what to focus on, constraining you to very strict timings and the one page that is supposed to give guidance doesn't work I'm tired of these apps not having proper tutorials and entire broken pages I look down at my phone after completing my tasks and I see notifications saying, "This is your last chance to do the routine". If I open up the app and I'm trying a routine out for the first time, I see these aggressive signaling telling me to get back on track. I'm not looking at my phone because I'm focused and it just demands my attention which is distracting in itself I'm being threatened and infantilized in response to assumed negligence. There is no guidance, only guilt."
            2. _watkinsemma_, Mar 29, 2026, 1/5: "I have my iPhone set with the font larger so it’s easier to see. This app is unreadable and therefore unusable if you have anything other than the standard font set."
            3. _nonawithoutanosering_, Feb 6, 2026, 3/5: "I think someone of the glitches need to be fixed. Case in point why have a tick button on your lock screen if it doesn’t automatically move you on to the next stage? It just opens the app. Similarly sometimes it does work, or what it is doing now which is I ticked to complete the task which ends the routine and the timer is still going. So love the app and what it does but it is glitchy as heck. UPDATE: it has now helpfully signed me out, doesn’t recognise my sign in and when I try to make a new account it has glitched and won’t go through"
---

### TickTick:To-do list,calendário {#review-app-10}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 3, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Colton Capps_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "Any app that limits functionality behind a paywall for basic features gets a 1 star from me. If you just offered bonus features or more benefits, I wouldn’t be upset, but you limit people on the amount of tasks they can create, lists they can make, countdowns they can have, and habits they can track. After a short amount of time using this app, it becomes unusable without forking over money every month. I can’t even check off my repeating tasks now that I have “reached my limit.” Quit being so greedy."
            2. _Wizzard192_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "There is no way to set a time in task completed/restart App is nothing but bugs. Rip off"
            3. _SpiritLoveRoot_, Jul 3, 2026, 5/5: "1. Better repeating task options 2. Better Calendar Views & Integrations 3. Ability to link tasks to each more easily 4. Ability to integrate with Notion more easily 5. Todoist has a nicer UI, is slightly less buggy, and has a slightly nicer quick entry option for tasks 6. But in general, just a lot more little nice power features that make it substantially better than Todoist"
---

### Microsoft To Do: Lists & Tasks {#review-app-11}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 29, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _James Anderson_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "Android device list syncing is so so broken since the last release or two. Such a shame, used to be a decent app."
            2. _Magdalena Diec_, Jul 3, 2026, 1/5: "I love this app and have used it for many years, daily. But lately, for a few days or a week now - it doesn't synchronize properly between the PC and my phone which makes this app unusable for me. There is also no way to contact To Do support - that option has vanished from the app completely. General Microsoft support cannot help me and FAQ/help article is majorly outdated."
            3. _Medewerker Bedrijf_, May 21, 2026, 2/5: "As every Microsoft product, it spams you with popups whenever you do not wish to use the settings they want you to. Disabling notifications makes it near unusable, starting up behind two popups telling me to enable them. Stop this horrible behaviour. Other than that, it should be simple and I suppose it is, so it would be 5 stars if it did not interupt me all the time."

### Flora - Green Focus {#review-app-13}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 24, 2026 - Jun 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _rwnenenenenenenen_, Jun 13, 2026, 2/5: "i love this app i use it all the time. ive been using it for 3 years now but it is SOOO glitchy. when i do a certain amount of hours and i pause it for like 3 minutes, it randomly just removes all the previous time i spent studying so i lose my prpgress. do better!!"
            2. _T R C VLOGZ_, Apr 24, 2026, 3/5: "Was a good app for months, but gone buggy af recently, eg I’d start a timer, leave my phone off, get the notification that my tree has grown and go back on, the timer still where it was / up to 5 mins after where I left it! Then today I can’t even start a session! Real pain cos it was such a good app!"
            3. _Idhdjebwbqh_, Apr 28, 2026, 4/5: "Love the app so much, it’s super motivating. However there are a few bugs I noticed: 1. Sometimes when I pledge a price and pause the focus (and come back), when the session is finished the app tells me I need to pay the price even though the tree never died. 2. Sometimes my focus sessions don’t record properly, e.g. if I set a 2 hour session, pause for 5 minutes and come back, the entire session will only be recorded as 10 mins long (make it make sense…) 3. Sometimes the app lies to me and tells me I have more bits than I actually have, I only realise when I try and buy a plant and it doesn’t allow me to buy it due to “insufficient bits”."
---

### Noji – Simple study flashcards {#review-app-14}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jan 28, 2026 - Jun 7, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _no u need a sandwhich_, May 24, 2026, 1/5: "App crashed and was unusable for the whole exam season. No biggie though, it’s not like I kept ALL my FLASHCARDS on the FLASHCARDS app."
            2. _Study_Nerd_, May 15, 2026, 1/5: "I paid for the app when this was still under the name Anki. This is not the Anki app this is a rip off of the original. That is why they changed their name to Noji. They are misleading & this app crash for 10 days. They will still charge you 30.00 even when you cancel. Beware!"
            3. _Batwing53_, May 3, 2026, 3/5: "Noji has been a game changer for my daily study routine! I've been using it every day and it just fits so perfectly into my schedule, like I don’t even have to force myself to open it. The AI card creation is super cool, makes learning so much easier. That said, I do wish I had discovered this app earlier! I've noticed a few bugs here and there but nothing major. Overall, I'm really enjoying my time with it and can't wait to see my progress. Definitely recommend it!"
